# Pull Request — Web App Launchpad

## Summary

-

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test / quality
- [ ] Other

## Review Notes

Explain what changed and why it improves the project.

## Screenshots / Evidence

Add screenshots, terminal output, or test notes when relevant.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and easy to review.
- [ ] README/docs were updated if needed.
- [ ] No secrets or private configuration files are included.
- [ ] I reviewed the diff before opening this PR.
